response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not adapted to the pressure of water  
their immune system reacts to peanut proteins which are not present in water  
the lack of oxygen in water makes it difficult for them to breathe  
the buoyancy of water would make it hard for them to stay afloat  

Sec. 2  
the human body is designed for air based activities not water based ones  
peanut allergy is an immune response not a physical limitation  
the absence of peanuts in water does not affect their ability to survive  
the environment under water is not suitable for human life
